apps.title: Reachy Mini Radio
apps.desktop_port_note: Rebuild as a native radio tuner where head tilt maps directly to station frequency.

apps.title: Theremini
apps.desktop_port_note: Keep the theremin idea, but retune controls so head movement and antennas feel immediate and stable on desktop.

apps.title: Reachy Mini Clock
apps.desktop_port_note: Use antenna positions and a cleaner always-on native clock card.

apps.title: Reachy Mini Metronome
apps.desktop_port_note: Use mirrored antenna swing, BPM controls, and dependable local audio output.

apps.title: Hand Tracker V2
apps.desktop_port_note: Rehost the hand-following logic with your direct camera path instead of the broken app wrapper.

apps.title: Emotions
apps.desktop_port_note: Expose the emotion wheel and review flow as a native emotion browser.

apps.title: Chess Emotions App
apps.desktop_port_note: Pair chess-state input with emotion reactions and a cleaner move/reaction timeline.

apps.title: Reachy Mini Astronomer
apps.desktop_port_note: Port the astronomy conversation/profile flow into the same embedded conversation host used by Rubik Coach.

apps.title: DJ Reactor
apps.desktop_port_note: Use local BPM/energy analysis and drive dance moves from the audio stream.

apps.title: DJ Reachy
apps.desktop_port_note: Treat this as the generative music variant, separate from DJ Reactor's reactive beat mode.
